opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: There is a massive, boiling hot boil on the back of my leg, the pain is blinding, and I feel like I have the flu. I can't sit down or lie on it — please help.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A lump on the back of my thigh has been getting bigger and more painful over the last few days and today it's come to a head and I've started feeling feverish.

symptom_narrative.onset: about four days ago a small tender lump appeared on the back of my right thigh
symptom_narrative.character: a relentless, severe throbbing; the lump feels tight and hot and now there's a soft spot in the middle that looks like it's about to burst
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst pain I've ever had — blinding, I can't sit or sleep
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the back of my right thigh
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and getting worse, especially in the last day
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — paracetamol and ibuprofen did absolutely nothing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any pressure on it, sitting, or lying on that side
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've come over feverish and shivery in the last 12 hours and feel wiped out, like the flu
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't sit down at all, can't sleep, and I've been pacing the room

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives at home on their own; well enough until this lump blew up over the last few days

objective_data_offered.value: I took my temperature at home and it was 38 degrees
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer, not clinically verified

objective_data_offered.value: a large red angry lump about the size of a golf ball on the back of the thigh with a shiny soft yellow-ish spot in the middle that looks ready to pop; the surrounding skin looks red and stretched
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-held camera view only; extent of induration and fluctuance cannot be assessed on video

objective_data_offered.value: I look sweaty and flushed and I keep pacing because I can't sit still with the pain
